name: submit Conditional offer successfully

steps.name: Given the Draft Conditional API is available
When I submit an offer using "SubmitConditionalOffer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should have offerCode "surprise limitations"
And the response status should be "LoadedToCampaign"

fullName: Draft Conditional Offer: submit Conditional offer successfully
